title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at IndiaMart Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
